testcase.name: engineeringEmployee_hasCorrectBonus
testcase.system-out:
17:29:55.671 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.batch.BatchEtlJobTest]: BatchEtlJobTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 17:29:55.704 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.batch.BatchEtlApplication for test class com.example.batch.BatchEtlJobTest
